mapper.select: SELECT /* getAlimTemp */ ALIM_SITU , TEMP_CODE , TEMP_TITL , ALIM_TITL , TEMP_CONT , LINK_URLX , USEE_YSNO FROM TB_ALTEMP WHERE ALIM_SITU = #{alimSitu} AND TEMP_CODE = #{tempCode} AND USEE_YSNO = #{commYes}

SELECT /* getMyAlimList */ USER_NUMB , ALIM_NUMB , ALIM_SITU , TEMP_CODE , ALIM_TITL , ALIM_CONT , LINK_URLX , READ_YSNO , TO_CHAR(READ_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS READ_DATE , TO_CHAR(SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DATE , DELT_YSNO FROM TB_ALIMXX WHERE USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND NVL(DELT_YSNO, #{commNo}) = #{commNo} ORDER BY SEND_DATE DESC , ALIM_NUMB DESC
